nodes.name: Greg Mitchell
nodes.description: Survived the Alcatel restructuring, promoted in 2003. Manages a team now. More stable but works longer hours. Shows pride through nods and handshakes, not words.

nodes.name: Karen Mitchell
nodes.description: Real estate career is real now — she's good at it. Megan's high school years are consuming. Worries less about Drew because he seems so steady. Doesn't realize that steadiness has a cost.

nodes.name: Megan Mitchell
nodes.description: 14, freshman at Plano Senior High. Varsity soccer. Pulling away from the family — closed door, phone calls, eye-rolling. Drew admires her and is invisible to her in roughly equal measure.

nodes.name: Carol Novak
nodes.description: The most important relationship in Drew's intellectual life. Taught him to garden. They fixed her back porch railing together. Gives him books without comment and lets him talk about them when he's ready.

nodes.name: Connor Huang
nodes.description: Getting into skateboarding and video games. Starting to care about what other kids think in ways Drew doesn't yet. The friendship is solid but the gap between their interests is widening.

nodes.name: Kyle Briggs
nodes.description: Fifth grade alpha. Bigger than everyone, dad coaches youth football. Tested Drew twice — lunch tray, called him a nerd. Drew didn't flinch either time, which confused Kyle enough to move on.
